column1: HOW TO COLLECT A DATA POINT:
1. Place item on scale. Wait for the scale LCD to stabilise and show a reading.
2. In the app, wait for a reading card to appear. Tap Share row.
3. Share → Copy. Paste the row into column A of the DATA section below.
4. Column B (Actual Scale Display) will be BLANK — type exactly what the physical scale LCD shows (e.g. 245 g, 0.86 oz, 1 lb 2.40 oz).
Column B is the ground truth. The app-parsed value in the last column may be wrong — ignore it for reverse engineering.
Known: B0=FE B1=EF (header). B4/B5: D0 05 = stable. B7: unit byte. B8/B9: weight (little-endian, divisor TBD).
For negative: tare scale with item on it (press tare/zero button while item is on scale), then remove item — LCD should go negative.
HYPOTHESIS TABLE — fill in from captured rows
Formula: (B8 | B9<<8) / divisor  — fill in divisor per unit from captured data
